stemHtml: The approximate angular coverage of reliable navigation information for a 3° ILS glide path out to a distance of 10 NM is:

options.a: 1.35° above the horizontal to 5.25° above the horizontal and 8° each side of the localiser centreline.
options.b: 0.45° above the horizontal to 1.75° above the glide path and 8° each side of the localiser centreline.
options.c: 3° above and below the glide path and 10° each side of the localiser centreline.
options.d: 0.7° above and below the glide path and 2.5° each side of the localiser centreline.
